channel.title: Diaspora on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Diaspora on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Auntie Cheryl's Trinidad Update – Thursday, April 9, 2026
item.description: Auntie Cheryl in Chaguanas reads the news and is pleased about most of it.

item.title: Cousin Leroy's Jamaica Update – Thursday, April 9, 2026
item.description: Cousin Leroy in the Bronx reads the Jamaica news and has some thoughts.

item.title: Miss Violet's Barbados Bulletin – Thursday, April 9, 2026
item.description: Miss Violet in Brooklyn reads about Barbados and has high standards for everything.
